Title: Hope & Faith
Actors: Faith Ford, Kelly Ripa, Macey Cruthird
Plot: They're sisters, but blood may be the only thing they have in common. When Faith, a soap opera diva, is killed off her show, "The Sacred and the Sinful," she flees the tabloids by moving to the suburbs with her sister, Hope's, fam...
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 6 nominations total
